revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:四緑木星]]
{{More citations needed|date=December 2018|qq=}}
{| class="floatright wikitable" style="text-align:center; font-family:serif;" |+ Post-Heaven Lo Shu Square |- | style="background-color:#FF80C0; font-weight:bold;" | 4 || 9 || 2 |- | 3 || 5 || 7 |- | 8 || 1 || 6 |}
{| class="floatright wikitable" style="text-align:center; font-family:serif;" |+ When Shiroku is in the center |- | 3 || 8 || 1 |- | 2 || style="background-color:#FF80C0; font-weight:bold;" | 4 || 6 |- | 7 || 9 || 5 |}
'''Shiroku Mokusei''' (四緑木星) is one of the {{ill|Nine Stars|ja|九星|1=Nine Stars|2=ja|3=九星|lt=Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|qq=}} used in {{ill|Calendar|en|Calendar|qid=Q12132|lt=calendars|1=Calendar}} and {{ill|Divination|en|Divination|qid=Q1043197|lt=fortune-telling|1=Divination}}. In the Post-Heaven Lo Shu Square, it occupies the southeastern position.
While it belongs to the same Wood element as {{ill|Sanpeki Mokusei|ja|三碧木星|1=Third Blue Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpeki Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Third Blue Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpeki Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Third Blue Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpeki Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Third Blue Wood Star|qq=}}, Shiroku Mokusei represents fully matured trees that are ready for use as timber.
== Attributes == * {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|qid=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}} - {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|it|Legno (elemento)|es|Madera (Wu Xing)|tr|Tahta (klasik element)|bcl|Kahoy (wuxing)|ca|Fusta (wuxing)|it|Legno (elemento)|es|Madera (Wu Xing)|nl|Hout (element)|vi|Mộc (Ngũ hành)|tr|Tahta (klasik element)|ta|மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Bagua|en|Bagua|qid=Q340846|lt=Bagua|1=Bagua}} - {{ill|Xùn (Bagua)|ja|巽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xùn (Bagua)|lt=Xun (巽)|qq=}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} - {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|zh|甲|hak|Kap (thiên-kôn)|ja|Kinoe|ko|갑 (천간)|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|za|Gyap (diengan)|zh-classical|甲|zh-min-nan|Kah (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|甲 (天干)|zh|甲 (天干)|qq=}}, {{ill|Kinoto (乙)|ja|乙|zh|乙|gan|乙|hak|Yet (thiên-kôn)|ja|Kinoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|vi|Ất|za|Iet (diengan)|zh-min-nan|It (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|乙|zh|乙|qq=}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} - {{ill|Dragon (zodiac)|en|Dragon (zodiac)|qid=Q731434|lt=Dragon (辰)|1=Dragon (zodiac)}}, [[Snake (zodiac)|Snake (巳)]] * Season - Spring * Direction - Southeast * Month - April, May * Time - 7:00–11:00 * Number - Three, Eight * Color - Green * Taste - Sour
== Symbolic Meanings == * Entrance and exit, long-lasting, distant places, wind, trees, flowers, trust, organization, trade, transportation, hesitation, delays, eldest daughter, arrangement, communication * Fate, relationships, completion, reputation, official orders, matchmaking, marriage, spirit, travel, commuting, negotiation, misunderstandings, miscommunication, invasion ** Misjudgment, transportation, hospitality ** Related to the body: intestines, left hand, trachea, esophagus, arteries, nerves, muscles, respiratory system ** ** == Relationships with Other Stars == * Generating Cycle (相生) - {{ill|First White Water Star|ja|一白水星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|qq=}} (Water generates Wood), {{ill|Ninth Purple Fire Star|ja|九紫火星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninth Purple Fire Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninth Purple Fire Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninth Purple Fire Star|qq=}} (Wood generates Fire) * Overcoming Cycle (相克) - {{ill|Second Black Earth Star|ja|二黒土星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|qq=}} (Wood overcomes Earth), {{ill|Fifth Yellow Earth Star|ja|五黄土星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fifth Yellow Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fifth Yellow Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fifth Yellow Earth Star|qq=}} (Wood overcomes Earth), {{ill|Sixth White Metal Star|ja|六白金星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sixth White Metal Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sixth White Metal Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sixth White Metal Star|qq=}} (Metal overcomes Wood), {{ill|Seventh Red Metal Star|ja|七赤金星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventh Red Metal Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventh Red Metal Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventh Red Metal Star|qq=}} (Metal overcomes Wood), {{ill|Eighth White Earth Star|ja|八白土星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eighth White Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eighth White Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eighth White Earth Star|qq=}} (Wood overcomes Earth) * Harmonious Relationship (比和) - {{ill|Third Blue Wood Star|ja|三碧木星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Third Blue Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Third Blue Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Third Blue Wood Star|qq=}}, Shiroku Mokusei
== Years in Which Shiroku Mokusei Occupies the Center == Years in which the remainder when divided by 9 is 7 are Shiroku Mokusei years.
‥‥ - {{ill|1942|en|1942|qid=Q18625|lt=1942|1=1942}} **- {{ill|1951|en|1951|qid=Q18591|lt=1951|1=1951}} - {{ill|1960|en|1960|qid=Q3754|lt=1960|1=1960}} - {{ill|1969|en|1969|qid=Q2485|lt=1969|1=1969}} - {{ill|1978|en|1978|qid=Q2483|lt=1978|1=1978}} - {{ill|1987|en|1987|qid=Q2429|lt=1987|1=1987}} - {{ill|1996|en|1996|qid=Q2070|lt=1996|1=1996}} - {{ill|2005|en|2005|qid=Q2019|lt=2005|1=2005}} - {{ill|2014|en|2014|qid=Q1999|lt=2014|1=2014}} - {{ill|2023|en|2023|qid=Q49622|lt=2023|1=2023}} - {{ill|2032|en|2032|qid=Q12790|lt=2032|1=2032}} - {{ill|2041|en|2041|qid=Q49914|lt=2041|1=2041}} - {{ill|2050|en|2050|qid=Q49925|lt=2050|1=2050}} - {{ill|2059|en|2059|qid=Q49935|lt=2059|1=2059}} - {{ill|2068|en|2068|qid=Q890596|lt=2068|1=2068}} - ‥‥ Despite their names, the Nine Stars are not related to celestial objects like the planets in the {{ill|Solar System|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Solar System|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Solar System|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Solar System|qq=}}. == Nine Stars Comparison Chart == {{main|{{ill|Nine Stars|ja|九星|1=Nine Stars|2=ja|3=九星|lt=Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|qq=}}|qq=}} {| class="wikitable" !Star !Reading !Five Element !Direction !Branch !Eight Trigram !Color |- !{{ill|First White Water Star|ja|一白水星|1=First White Water Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|qq=}} |Ippaku Suisei |{{ill|Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|uk|Вода
